scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.deploy: pnpm build && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply learn-db --remote --env production
scripts.deploy:content: npx tsx tools/export-sql.ts > /tmp/content-import.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute learn-db --remote --file=/tmp/content-import.sql --env production
